settings.label: Hero image to preload (homepage)
settings.info: Used to improve LCP. Pick the same image used in the Hero section.

settings.content: Fonts are loaded from Google Fonts in theme.liquid — Bodoni Moda (display), Cormorant Garamond (serif), Jost (sans labels), Noto Naskh Arabic + IBM Plex Sans Arabic.
This theme reads the following product metafields (define in Settings → Custom data → Products):
• custom.title_ar (single-line text) — Arabic product title, shown alongside English on product cards.
• custom.subtitle (single-line text) — optional subtitle under the product title.
• custom.hover_image (file) — optional alternate image shown on hover.
• custom.description_ar (rich text) — Arabic description used on the product page.
Tag a product with `signature` to show the Signature badge on its card.
